product_snapshot.name: FlowSync
product_snapshot.description: FlowSync is a workflow automation platform that eliminates manual data entry and repetitive back-office processes. Operations and finance teams use it to automate reconciliation, data syncs, and approval workflows across their existing systems.

value_drivers.name: Time Savings
value_drivers.description: Automates repetitive manual tasks, freeing staff to focus on higher-value work

value_drivers.name: Error Reduction
value_drivers.description: Eliminates human data entry errors and the downstream rework they cause

value_drivers.name: Process Scalability
value_drivers.description: Handles volume increases without adding headcount

pain_points: 3 operations analysts spend 60% of their time on manual reconciliation
5% error rate in data entry causes significant downstream audit rework
Volume is growing 30% YoY but headcount budget is frozen
customer.notes: Considering a Q3 rollout. Current tool is a mix of Excel and a legacy ERP.

fields.label: Analysts performing manual reconciliation
fields.description: Number of FTEs whose primary task involves manual data reconciliation

fields.label: Hours per analyst per week on manual tasks
fields.description: Average time each analyst spends on reconciliation and data entry each week

fields.label: Fully-loaded cost per analyst hour
fields.description: Salary + benefits + overhead per analyst hour

fields.label: Data entry error rate
fields.description: Percentage of transactions requiring rework due to errors

fields.label: Hours to remediate one error
fields.description: Average time to identify, investigate, and correct a single data entry error

fields.label: Monthly reconciliation transactions
fields.description: Total number of transactions processed manually each month

output_metrics.label: Annual Time Saved
output_metrics.description: Total analyst hours recovered from manual reconciliation per year

output_metrics.label: Annual Labour Cost Savings
output_metrics.description: Value of analyst time recovered, at fully-loaded cost

output_metrics.label: Annual Error Remediation Savings
output_metrics.description: Cost of rework eliminated by removing data entry errors

output_metrics.label: Total Annual Savings
output_metrics.description: Combined labour savings plus error remediation savings

calculator.rationale: Meridian's core pain is analyst time lost to manual reconciliation and downstream audit rework from data errors. These metrics directly quantify both: recovered analyst capacity (the largest cost lever) and error-driven rework (their compliance risk). The transaction volume field captures the scalability argument as their 30% YoY growth makes manual processing increasingly unsustainable.
